<?php namespace Spatie\FlareClient\Context; class BaseContextProviderDetector implements ContextProviderDetector { public function detectCurrentContext(): ContextProvider { if ($this->runningInConsole()) { return new ConsoleContextProvider($_SERVER['argv'] ?? []); } return new RequestContextProvider(); } protected function runningInConsole(): bool { if (isset($_ENV['APP_RUNNING_IN_CONSOLE'])) { return $_ENV['APP_RUNNING_IN_CONSOLE'] === 'true'; } if (isset($_ENV['FLARE_FAKE_WEB_REQUEST'])) { return false; } return in_array(php_sapi_name(), ['cli', 'phpdb']); } }
